programme.title: Second innings
programme.desc: From Afghanistan to London, three boys build a new life playing cricket. Tucked away in suburban south London, matches take place every week for young and often traumatised asylum seekers. Many have fled war and have been separated from their families. The Refugee Cricket project, organised by the Refugee Council, provides not only a chance to play and make friends, but also to access advice and support as they navigate the complex asylum system and other challenges in their new home

programme.title: Lord of the Rain: one man's fight against climate catastrophe
programme.desc: Doyte lives in South Omo, Ethiopia, one of the most remote areas in the world and hard hit by the climate crisis. As Lord of the Rain, it's Doyte's job to summon the rains, but for five years they haven't come. Ethiopia's economy is booming, fuelled by green power and climate-resilient policies. But neither the government, nor Doyte, can reverse the catastrophic change that's devastating their environment

programme.title: Working nights to pack your California strawberries, working days to graduate from school
programme.desc: Ashley Solis is a Mexican American teenager, farmworker and factory worker who dreams of being the first in her family to graduate from high school and go to college. Her mother is undocumented, and like many families with mixed documented status, they face the threat of family separation. With responsibility for earning enough to look after her sisters, Ashley balances working nights in a California strawberry-freezing factory with her school attendance.

programme.title: Black Pete | Comedy theatre about life in the Calais refugee camp
programme.desc: Black Pete: Why is the Dutch blackface tradition still going strong? | I don't want any more sadness in my life - comedy theatre about life in the Calais refugee camp

programme.title: Saintmaking: the canonisation of Derek Jarman by queer 'nuns'
programme.desc: This year marks the 30th anniversary of film-maker Derek Jarman's canonisation by an activist group of gay male 'nuns' known as the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence. At the time in 1991, Derek Jarman was the most prominent person in the UK living openly with HIV. He was outspoken, radical and unapologetically queer. The perfect antidote, in the Sisters' eyes, to Ian McKellen's acceptance of a knighthood in the 1991 new year honours.

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Dear Bradford: a love letter to a misunderstood city
programme.desc: From Muslim ‘no-go areas' to Brexit-voting white nationalists, stereotypes continue to be perpetuated about Bradford 21 years after the 'race riots'. Farhaan was born in the city in the 1980s to a family of south Asian Muslim heritage. From a young age he feared being ‘found out' and lived a dual existence, moving away from Bradford as soon as he could. He spent years travelling the world and teaching English. But, when the coronavirus pandemic hit, Farhaan was reluctantly forced to return to his hometown. Through his beloved grandma, or 'Amma', and the poetry of his late grandfather, Farhaan learned how to love Bradford – and himself.

programme.title: Can Yanis Varoufakis save Europe?
programme.desc: The Greek economist is back battling the EU establishment, this time at the helm of a new movement, DiEM25. Backed by Pamela Anderson and the world's most famous cyborg, he is fighting ultra-right populism with a radical agenda he thinks can restore people's lost faith in democracy. As the European parliamentary elections approach, is anyone listening? Phoebe Greenwood finds out

programme.title: Climate carnage: whose job is it to save the planet?
programme.desc: In November last year, the world's gaze focused on Glasgow at Cop26 as 'a historic, collective achievement' was forged between 200 countries – the Glasgow climate pact. Since then, unprecedented global events have threatened this commitment to limiting climate destruction, and the hopes of 'keeping 1.5 alive' have been dashed. We follow Fiona as she prepares for Cop27 in Egypt, asking presidents, global leaders, activists and scientists if global diplomacy is enough to save humanity from the brink of annihilation.

programme.title: Chalk Girl
programme.desc: Chalk Girl: a protester at the heart of Hong Kong's democracy movement. Two years since her arrest made her an accidental infamous hero of the pro-democracy umbrella movement, the 16-year-old must decide whether to rejoin the battle alongside the 'localist' youth. As elections loom, Chalk Girl is torn between wanting to respect her family, who are concerned about the risks of her activism, and standing up to Chinese interference.

programme.title: How a community fought the Louisiana floods | How algorithms are cutting Americans' healthcare
programme.desc: Torrential downpours in Louisiana led to catastrophic flooding in August 2016, submerging entire communities and displacing thousands of residents. Volunteers did whatever they could to help – rescuing stranded people, organising food and shelter and providing security. | US states are using algorithms to figure out whether people are eligible for public benefits and how much care they should receive. But it isn't without its problems.

programme.title: Inside the mission to create an army of Greta Thunbergs
programme.desc: Melanie Harwood is an education entrepreneur and self-styled 'disruptor', who has partnered with the United Nations to educate teachers about climate change. The Guardian's Richard Sprenger joined her on a trip to Dubai, to witness her unorthodox approach first hand

programme.title: Fighting addiction on Pine Ridge reservation
programme.desc: Whiteclay, Nebraska is a tiny unincorporated town that sits on the border with South Dakota. Until its closure by state officials, its four liquor stores sold more than 4m cans of beer a year, almost entirely to members of Lakota Sioux tribe on the Pine Ridge Indian reservation, where the sale of alcohol is banned. The Guardian spent time on the reservation to understand the impact of alcohol on its residents – and the activists and Lakota tribe members determined to keep the town closed

programme.title: I was a terrorist
programme.sub-title: now I run a kindergarten | Is Finland the best place in the world to be a parent?
programme.desc: Hendi Suhartono was part of a plot to detonate four book bombs and blow up a church in Indonesia. He spent seven years in prison after going through a deradicalisation process. After Hendi was released from prison, he received support to open a kindergarten. Hendi meets a friend from his past, Pepi Fernando, and they discuss what led to his radicalisation, the time in prison, his subsequent deradicalisation and how he is devoted to his community. | Finland is a world leader when it comes to early years education. Childcare is affordable and nursery places are universally available in a system that puts children's rights at the centre of decision-making.

programme.title: The Gene Gap: Should we edit our DNA? An imagined future of gene editing
programme.desc: There are decisions being made right now that could have an effect on global populations for generations to come. As part of this project, we commissioned an artist to investigate some of the themes raised in the podcasts. This work of fiction imagines a future where gene editing has become mainstream and discusses the moral, ethical and political divides that this might create

programme.title: Erica: man made
programme.desc: Erica is 23. She has a beautiful, neutral face and speaks with a synthesised voice. She has a degree of autonomy – but can't move her hands yet. Hiroshi Ishiguro is her ‘father' and the bad boy of Japanese robotics. Together they will redefine what it means to be human and reveal that the future is closer than we might think.

programme.title: Garth Nix answers your questions: on JRR Tolkien, gaming and pronouncing characters' names
programme.desc: In an ongoing series, Guardian Australia is getting kids and young adults to do the hard work instead of us – by interviewing their favourite authors. Here, the author of the Old Kingdom/Abhorsen, Seventh Tower and Keys to the Kingdom fantasy series opens up about queer representation, perfectionism and his writing tips.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In Juchitán, Mexico, muxes – children identified as male at birth, but who choose at a young age to be raised as female – are embraced as part of the community.

programme.title: Is this inclusive? Why only 4% of children's book heroes are BAME
programme.desc: More than 33% of students at UK schools are from black and minority ethnic backgrounds, but only 4% of the protagonists in children's books in the UK are BAME. The publishing industry has made big claims about its push for inclusivity both on and off the page, but some believe progress is painfully slow. Grace Shutti investigates what's taking UK publishing so long and meets some of the creators who are championing change, including the authors of hit books Amazing Grace and Look Up!, and the owners of inclusive publisher Round Table books.

programme.title: Blood, sweat and fears: special report on abuse towards grassroots football referees
programme.desc: The FA has rebooted its Respect Campaign this season to protect grassroots referees in England but many continue to suffer both mental and physical abuse. There are some horrifying stories but hope remains: as of 2019-20 season a new sin-bin system will be rolled out across all grassroots leagues for anybody caught abusing a referee, with other initiatives also in the pipeline.

programme.title: Rosehaven
programme.desc: It's a rare warm and sunny day in Rosehaven as Daniel discovers there may be some karma involved in rejecting money from an old lady to buy ice-cream.

programme.title: Rosehaven
programme.desc: Dating is top of mind for Emma and Daniel as they go online to find love.

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: The officers attend to noisy neighbours, an ice cream van man serving hard liquor and a raid on an arcade.

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Basketball isn't just for professionals.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: Penn and Teller face magicians out to impress including Christopher Tracy, Jim Leach, Neil Croswell and Ben Young.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: Qualifiers 4: Live from the Pasadena Civic Auditorium, 11 performers take the stage as judging is turned over to the American viewing audience to vote for their favourite performers

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie takes the ingredients we buy every week and uses them in exciting ways to create new family favorites. He combines chicken and sausages to reinvent the roast chicken in a one-pan wonder and puts a British twist on the classic Bolognese.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie makes everyday ingredients extraordinary, and his cauliflower cheese pasta does just that a stunningly simple, delicious new favorite. Plus, he creates a healthier twist on the Chicken Kiev the whole family will love.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers create a mini-collection.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The crew dives into the paranoid world of government conspiracies to expose a heartless tabloid newscaster as a fraud.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Police want to put a stop to the drug supply in Derby, and take away any assets and cash that have been made illegally. And we hear what happened when the RNLI are called out to assist a yacht in distress but who end up alerting Border Force after it refuses to be rescued.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Find out what happens when police crack down on a number of addresses they believed are being used to sell drugs. And we hear how Wiltshire police surveillance on a former nuclear bunker ends up with a shocking discovery, one of the biggest of its kind in the UK!

programme.title: Las Vegas with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: In the first episode, Trevor tracks down one of Vegas's most famous – and not to mention, infamous – residents, former undisputed heavyweight champion of the world, Mike Tyson.

programme.title: Las Vegas with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: In the second episode of Trevor's journey into Sin City he meets mobster Andrew Didonato, a former member of the New York mafia's biggest crime family, the Gambinos.

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: The comedy coppers must help a hungover high-heeled harridan in a hedge, find a felon in fancy dress and guard gig-goers going to a great gig. Meanwhile, the chief commissioner launches a logo live on BBC Radio Scotland.

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: PC McLaren and PC Fletcher involved in an undercover drugs bust rural officers MacKay and McIntosh get a whiff of something dodgy on a local farm and it's tough at the top as Chief Commissioner Miekelson chooses a new slogan

programme.title: Life on Mars
programme.desc: A hostage situation becomes personal for Sam when the hostage-taker's deadline coincides with the deadline Doctors have given for switching off his life support machine in 2006

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Smart Home Nation
programme.sub-title: Wellness By The Sea / Historic Smart Home
programme.desc: Tanya tours a spectacular seaside mansion outside LA where air, water, light and sound are all monitored by a high-tech system that targets human health. Tanya discovers that the home's integrated wellness technology improves everything from sleep to mood. Next, Tanya explores an 1835 Georgian-style historic home in Toronto filled with smart surprises. The biggest one: the entire house had to be lifted to put a state-of-the-art home theater underneath its two-century-old floorboards.

programme.desc: Oslo is the oldest of the Scandinavian capitals with a rich history dating back to over 1000 years, the city's iconic monuments reveal its evolution through the ages to visitors. Elisha goes on a tour to see some of them such as the magnificent Arkeshus Castle, a medieval castle that was built to protect Oslo but was used instead as a prison, and Oslo City Hall, the administrative center of the city which hosts the annual Nobel peace prize ceremony.

programme.title: XP Guide_Oslo 2, Norway
programme.desc: Perhaps the most famous period in Norwegian history was the Viking Age. Far from just barbaric, axe-wielding invaders, the Vikings were Norse seafarers who left a major impact on European history through trade, colonization, and far-flung exploration. During Elisha's visit to Oslo, she finds herself in awe of the extraordinary well-designed Viking ships at a museum, where she comes to know fascinating stories about the lives led by the Vikings.

programme.title: Landmarks Ha Long Bay, Vietnam

programme.desc: Bone up on dogproofing before an only child sets out to find her new bestie.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Explore unique fixes for a croc-bitten turtle, two tiny fish, and a lumpy skink.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Examine an overdue pregnant lizard and a cranky python who's gasping for air.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Find groundbreaking solutions for airborne animals: a galah and a sugar glider.

programme.title: The Queen Mother: An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: This remarkable portrait digs beneath the surface and presents for the first time a balanced account of the life of a powerful and exceptional woman.

programme.title: Prince Philip: An Extraordinary Life
programme.desc: Born in Corfu in 1921, Prince Philip has lived on the national stage through Britain's move from Empire to Commonwealth amid all the extraordinary political and social changes that have taken place since he married Princess Elizabeth in 1947.

programme.title: Queen Silvia of Sweden
programme.desc: Welcome to Stockholm and to the Royal Palace. In this day and age, royal families seem to make headline only when they get married, or when the popular press knows scandals about their private lives. Here in Sweden there are rumours, of course, and sometimes headlines, but the fact remains, the monarchy is very popular, and especially the Queen, Queen Silvia, by far the most admired and loved person in Sweden. Her Majesty the Queen has accepted to see us.

programme.title: H.M. The Queen: Her True Story
programme.desc: This is the story of a remarkable life of a remarkable woman.

programme.title: Balkan Royals
programme.desc: The royal families are back in the Balkans. Once ousted by the communists, they now enjoy a high reputation again. Externally, they act as representatives of their states internally, as moral and neutral institutions.

programme.title: Kate: The Making of a Modern Queen
programme.desc: Combining remarkable footage and expert interviews, this authoritative special presents the true story of Kate Middleton.

programme.title: Diana and Sarah: Royal Wives of Windsor
programme.desc: An intimate documentary portrait of the two most controversial royals.

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots are given a triple blow.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When a life signal is received from Cliffjumper, the Autobots roll out and are met by newly-returned Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead is on a mission to rescue Agent Fowler, who has been kidnapped by the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Utilizing the Dark Energon, Megatron summons an army of undead warriors to battle Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Scorponok captures Tidal Wave and makes him follow his orders so that they can revive Megatron with energon.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Petrified Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's done it again. This time, in front of Papa Smurf, too. He has recited a spell that changes everything to stone. Everything including himself and all the Smurfs and the Village, and the forest around for miles... Fortunately, Peewit appears....

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: Return To Don Smurfo
programme.desc: When a drop of Papa Smurf's new potion spills on the Smurflings' adventure book, the fictional hero springs to life. The dashing Don Smurfo, willing to rid the Smurf of the evil Gargamel, gallantly captures him...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Flighty's Plight: Flighty Smurf, as his name implies, can't make his own mind up about anything. The other Smurfs take him to the forest for a survival test in which he can find his way home only by making decisions. He ends up in Balthazar's castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Born Rotten: As the Smurfs prepare for the Festival of the Stars, Gargamel plants a creature in their midst that smells so rotten that he can easily be traced to the Smurf village. Papa Smurf realizes that Born Rotten is from another planet, and he instructs Feathers to return him to his home before Gargamel finds them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Marco Smurf And The Pepper Pirates: The Smurfs sail off in their sailing boat to save Marco Smurf, who has been captured at sea by Captain Pepper. Marina and a dolphin help to free Marco.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: Gormandizing Greedy
programme.desc: Greedy overdoes it. He's getting heavier and heavier until his weight puts him in jeopardy. The evil Gargamel is going to catch him... Can Greedy be saved by Papa Smurf?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Pet For Baby Smurf: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Squeaky: This is the dramatic, moving story of the friendship between Smurfette and her pet mouse. A sad event reduces Smurfette to tears... Can the Smurfs comfort the despairing Smurfette?

programme.title: The Mr Smurf Contest
programme.desc: When Papa decides to throw a Harvest Moon ball, all the male Smurfs compete in a "Mr Smurf" contest for the honor of escorting Sassette. Gargamel sneaks into the contest after shrinking himself with blue dye, in the hope of capturing all the Smurfs when he returns to normal size. The Smurfs kick him out and Sassette lets Papa escort her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sideshow Smurfs: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: Grand Old Duke of York
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings the Grand Old Duke of York. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and The Biscuit Boys. And when Po plays a special drum, something magic happens in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Guessing Game
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children have fun playing a guessing game. A book appears in Teletubbyland and Laa-Laa loves to count the rabbits.

programme.title: Gymnastics
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun creeping round the column in Home Hill before watching some children doing gymnastics. Laa-Laa plays catch ball indoors with the other Teletubbies, but the Noo-Noo catches the ball first.

programme.title: Haymaking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children making hay. A tree appears in Teletubbyland and the Noo-Noo tidies up all the Teletubbies favourite things.

programme.title: Herding Sheep
programme.desc: Some voice trumpets rise to wish the Tubbies good morning. The Teletubbies watch some children herding sheep. The Teletubbies go in and out, and up and down, round the corner and along to top until it is time for Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Hey Diddle Diddle
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Hickory Dickory Dock
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children dancing while King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys play Hickory Dickory Dock. A voice trumpet appears and sings Hickory Dickory Dock.

programme.title: How Things Swim
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children visit and aquarium to learn how things swim in the water. The Teletubbies play an in and out game when a cloud appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings Humpty Dumpty. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys. Po has a falling down day. The Teletubbies count up to one and make up a falling down dance.

programme.title: Going on a Train
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to play slide games. They stop when it is time to watch some children go on a train journey. Po loves to ride her scooter, but one day it rolls away and Po chases it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Going to School by Boat
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch how some children who live on an island go to school by boat. A voice trumpet appears in Teletubbyland and the Teletubbies play a game called here and there.

programme.title: Good Morning
programme.desc: The Teletubbies finish up their toast in time to see Alex Pascall and some children go for a walk and sing Good Morning to everyone they meet. All the Teletubbies wanted to play with Dipsy, but Dipsy wants to dance.

programme.title: Gospel Singing
programme.desc: All the Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies see a girl whose mother is a very good singer. Four happy Teletubbies dance around Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: Grizzle accuses the Care Bears of stealing Mr. Beaks, and the bears offer to help despite his false claim.

programme.title: The Academy of Magic
programme.desc: From the team behind 'Cars' and 'Toy Story 2', 'The Academy of Magic' is a spellbinding adventure that fans of 'Harry Potter' will love! Aura is no ordinary young girl - she is gifted with magical powers. When a mysterious creature leads her to Montrose, a magic academy for children with extraordinary powers, Aura and her friends soon she learn that the school has a secret that she must uncover to protect herself and her friends.

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Buddy's got a new trick up his paw – football. When Buddy's owner suddenly becomes his school's next quarterback, Buddy falls in with the huddle as well! The dynamite pairing of Buddy and Josh help carry the Timberwolves to the state championship. All is well until two wicked Russian circus owners show up to dognap Buddy to be their star attraction. A movie that is a touchdown for the entire family!

programme.title: Sheep & Wolves: A Pig Deal
programme.desc: From the writer of Disney's 'Beauty & the Beast' comes a woolly, woolly fun adventure the whole family will enjoy! A united village of sheep and wolves are suddenly thrown in to chaos after an unexpected guest arrives with the aim of destroying their peaceful and quiet life. The towns new leader, Grey, embarks on a heroic mission to prove that team work really does make the best work as he unites his tribe.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: The shooting stars The ghost train Golf The salesman The boomerang At the farm Kung-fu Molang is an affectionate, humorous look at the relationship between an eccentric, joyful, and enthusiastic rabbit, and a shy, discreet, and emotional little chick. The series explores Molang and Piu Piu's everyday life with warmth and humor.

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk pumps iron Monk goes motorcycling Monk meets Quack-Quack Monk celebrates Christmas Monk the magician Monk, Mouch and the toothache Monk goes curling Monk is a jovial little dog who obstinately tries his best but always fails! When thins aren't working out for Monk, catastrophes follow. Things can get totally out of control real fast! Director/creator: Sungjae Kim, Natalys Raut Sieuzac, Suhoon Kim

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Rainy day The acrobats The jam jar The parrot The Robinsons The little monkey The casting Molang is an affectionate, humorous look at the relationship between an eccentric, joyful, and enthusiastic rabbit, and a shy, discreet, and emotional little chick. The series explores Molang and Piu Piu's everyday life with warmth and humor.

programme.title: Molang

The series explores Molang and Piu Piu's everyday life with warmth and humor.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Bernie has been given detention for bad grades at school. He has brought Corneil along with him to keep him company. When Corneil solves a difficult chemical equation, Bernie is mistakenly credited with it and hailed as a genius… and his troubles really begin. Will Corneil be able to get him out of this mess?

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Bernie asks Corneil to apply on his behalf to take part in the TV adventure game show “Jungle Panic”. He is accepted, on the condition that he brings Corneil with him! Will Corneil and Bernie survive a week on a desert island and can Corneil outsmart the other competitors without getting caught on camera?

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk hammers a nail Monk on a desert island Monk watches TV Monk goes ballooning Monk takes a bath Monk versus Sushi Monk has really got to go! Monk is a jovial little dog who obstinately tries his best but always fails! When thins aren't working out for Monk, catastrophes follow. Things can get totally out of control real fast!

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Alien Kind
programme.desc: Bernie is determined to prove to the other kids at school that aliens really do exist and persuades Corneil to dress up as one. When Romeo tells the whole school about his encounter with an extra terrestrial the next day, Bernie is furious to be left out of the limelight and takes things just that little bit too far…

programme.title: The Smurfs: The Sorcerer Smurf | Magical Meanie
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. | The Smurfs find a "meanie genie" that refuses to grant them their wishes until they call out the magic word.

programme.desc: Pocoyo and his friends make new music with their instruments.

programme.desc: Pocoyo comes up with many games to play with a ball.

programme.title: Dance Off!
programme.desc: One of Elly's favorite activities is dance classes, but it's much more fun if you enjoy it with your friends.

programme.title: Pocoyo
programme.desc: Pocoyo has a mission in the world, and it is to make you happy.

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: Smile, Rabbids!
programme.desc: When a family tries to take a nice picture at a wedding ceremony, the Rabbids ruin everything.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having a party.
programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: The Rabbids go on an adventure
programme.desc: The Desperados Rabbids, led by a charismatic rabbid outlaw, attack a convoy of pioneers headed West.

programme.title: The Rabbids take off.
programme.desc: The rabbids unintentionally help Zak and his childhood crush Zoey develop a romance…

programme.title: The Rabbids are having a party.
programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E36
programme.desc: Let's get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian's Battlin' Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E37
programme.desc: It's Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito's attacks, or will this Barian's fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E38
programme.desc: Girag's got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 220: Legendary Fisherman Part 2
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 221: Double Duel Part 1
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 223: Double Duel Part 3
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 224: Double Duel Part 4
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 225: The Rescue
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 226: Friends 'til the End Part 1
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 227: Friends 'til the End Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 228: Friends 'til the End Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 229: Friends 'til the End Part 4
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E20
programme.desc: The Egyptian leg of the World Championships culminates with the final match highlighting F Dynasty against the BBA Revolution. The day before the match, Tyson has Daichi practice moves with him that they're not usually accustomed to doing: namely, tag-team attacks.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E21
programme.desc: Tyson is feeling the pressure of being World Champion. Despite Hiro's warning, a television crew follows him around for a day, taping his every move. Daichi feels jealous and tries to compete for the camera's attention.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: Packed with incredible facts about the human body, Dr Chris and Dr Xand van Tulleken experiment and explore their way through the fascinating world of medicine and biology.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee is heading for an awesome summer at Camp Sunny Smiles but, when his bus takes a wrong turn, he ends up at run-down, spooky Camp Lakebottom instead.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: Have you ever done a science experiment and wondered “What would this be like if it were HUGE?” - Welcome to Science Max, the exciting series that turbocharges science experiments.

programme.title: Nerds and Monsters
programme.desc: A group of nerdy kids are washed up on an island inhabited by a tribe of hideous monsters.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Bo & To's Family

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.desc: It's midnight, and Steve sneaks into the kitchen for something sweet. He'd better hurry up before Maggie catches him, though! Too late. Never mind, the finger family and finger animals come along to / Play hide and seek with Steve as he tries to find everyone in the Teddy Bear family! Can he find them all in time for the tea party?

programme.title: Ollie: Pebble Run / Ollie's Dance / Pebble Tower
programme.desc: Charles invents a brilliant new game by the river. He is delighted to share it with Ollie and even the fish end up having a turn. / Ollie can't resist dancing to Mabel's catchy music, even when he's feeling grumpy! / Ollie and Spider try to find a balance for their pebble tower as well as for their friendship.

programme.title: Little Angel: Trip To The Mall / Going To A Fair / Playtime Song (At The Field)
programme.desc: It's a fun day at the mall. Baby John runs around, gets an ice cream and learns how to use the escalators. Join him and sing-along with our new kids video.

programme.title: Mofy: A Sunbeam / Help! / There Must Be A Prettier Flower Somewhere
programme.desc: It's a beautiful but harsh winter day. Mogu in a fluster tells Mofy that a little hedgehog has fallen in a hole and not being able to climb up. / Mofy and Kerry are giving out food to the animals in the forest who can't find anything to eat due to the heavy snow. Suddenly they hear a feeble voice, and surprised to find out Mogu trapped under the snow! / Mofy decides to decorate her cotton ball house with a pretty flower in the forest. She goes out in the forest with Kerry to find the prettiest flower in the forest.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Lions / Sand/ Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Blippi and Tabbs meet Jabari the lion who teaches them how to roar, sneak, and jump like a lion in this African adventure that addresses the fact that lions actually live in the savannah, not the jungle. / Blippi and D.Bo join Dwayne the boulder on his exciting adventure down a rushing mountain river to fulfill his lifelong dream of becoming a grain of sand! / The first episode in a 2 part special that ends with Blippi finding a treasure chest with a big special book inside! Blippi opens the book and the Curiosity Crew jump out and scatter around the Clubhouse, leaving the episode on a cliffhanger and Blippi asking “Who were they?”

programme.title: Masha and the Bear: La Dolce Vita / Just Shoot Me
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. / While the Bear is busy mending Masha's pretty dresses, she rummages through his closet and finds an old camera. She takes a photo and discovers that she has a talent for photography. She then decides to test her skills and arrange a photo session for all the forest animals.

programme.title: Construction Site: Carrie's Pallets
programme.desc: Carrie is a little jealous when the bigger machines get to landscape a new park so she decides to invent her own fork-lifting style.

programme.desc: Gracie contemplates copying an established dance for Make-It-All-Up-Day when she cannot come up with one on her own, but Angelina persuades her to improvise a new routine. Angelina has second thoughts

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: Departures
programme.desc: Skye (Maisie Williams), an impulsive teenager with a terminal illness, befriends Calvin (Asa Butterfield), a 19-year-old hypochondriac who is afraid of his own shadow. When Skye recruits Calvin to help her carry out her unconventional bucket list of things to do before she dies, he learns to confront and conquer his own fears, including his greatest fear of all: talking to the beautiful, but seemingly untouchable, Izzy (Nina Dobrev).

programme.title: Gloves Off
programme.desc: Doug was an amazing fighter, but a less than amazing businessman. Saddled with a gym in debt and a market more interested in virtual boxing than the real thing, he is struggling to keep his business afloat. Now he will have to try and save his beloved gym from being turned into a modern chain-gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight that has a prize big enough to solve his problems.

programme.title: Kids In America
programme.desc: A diverse group of high school students band together to peacefully stick it to their overbearing principal.

programme.title: King of California
programme.desc: An unstable dad who after getting out of a mental institution tries to convince his daughter that there's Spanish gold buried somewhere under suburbia.

programme.title: Electric Jesus
programme.desc: When a flashy promoter sells a Christian metal band on the promise of a summer tour in 1986, their desire to "make Jesus famous" meets the complexities and confusion of personal ambition, youthful zeal, lifelong friendships, and first love.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: It's A Wonderful Afterlife
programme.desc: Finding the perfect son-in-law can be murder. Mrs Sethi can't bear the thought of her daughter being alone and unhappy... she would make a great wife for some lucky man, if only she were given a chance. So when she can no longer stomach the rudeness of families who refuse her daughter, Mrs Sethi takes matters into her own hands with the only way she knows... Suddenly a police hunt begins for a serial murderer who cooks a killer curry.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Benji makes his cinematic debut as the beloved dog who has captured the heart of the town. When his favourite friends are kidnapped, Benji sets out to track them down and save the day.

programme.title: Priceless
programme.desc: Set against the wildly atmospheric backdrop of the French Riviera, Jean (Gad Elmaleh), a shy young bartender is mistaken for a millionaire by beautiful scheming opportunist Irene (Audrey Tautou). Abandoned when she discovers his true identity, a love-struck Jean has no intention of letting someone this gorgeous get away! Jean's comical attempts to gain Irene's affection gradually evolve to him setting himself up as a gigolo at the luxury hotel she is staying at...and then the fun really begins. A sexy and thoroughly charming romantic comedy, if you love Breakfast at Tiffany's, you'll love this.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.
